title: anthemis rigida subsp. ammanthiformis
intro: Anthemis rigida subsp. ammanthiformis is a subspecies of the Anthemis rigida plant, commonly known as a type of chamomile or yarrow, which is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, soothing digestive issues, and reducing fever. The health benefits of Anthemis rigida subsp. ammanthiformis include its ability to calm anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality due to its calming and soothing effects. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
